stemHtml: Consider the European Regulation on Air Operations as applicable to Commercial Air Transport operations. Flight time specification schemes shall state the conditions for extensions to the maximum basic daily FDP due to in-flight rest. These extensions shall take into account the…

options.a: type of aircraft operated, regardless of the type of in-flight rest facilities.
options.b: augmentation of the basic flight crew.
options.c: maximum in-flight rest allocated to each crew member.
